proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10-year higher `age_years` value is associated with longer `pfs_months` after adjustment for sex, ECOG performance status, stage IV status, sidedness, LDH, albumin, liver metastases, and bone metastases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ age_per_10 + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + right_sided_primary + ldh_per_100 + albumin_g_dl + liver_mets + bone_mets
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 1.760 months per 10-year higher age_years (SE 0.005, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-point higher `ecog_ps` score is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment for age, sex, stage IV status, sidedness, LDH, albumin, liver metastases, and bone metastases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + age_per_10 + sex_female + stage_iv + right_sided_primary + ldh_per_100 + albumin_g_dl + liver_mets + bone_mets
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -1.177 months per one-point higher ecog_ps (SE 0.007, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0 after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ stage_iv + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -1.354 months for stage_iv=1 versus 0 (SE 0.009, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1 g/dL higher `albumin_g_dl` value is associated with longer `pfs_months` after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ albumin_g_dl + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 0.465 months per 1 g/dL higher albumin_g_dl (SE 0.009, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 5 percentage-point higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` value is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ weight_loss_per_5 + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.378 months per 5 percentage-point higher weight_loss_pct_6mo (SE 0.006, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `kras_mutation` equal to 0 after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ kras_mutation + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.328 months for kras_mutation=1 versus 0 (SE 0.009, p=2.28e-291).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with either `kras_mutation` or `nras_mutation` (`ras_mutated` equal to 1) have shorter `pfs_months` than RAS-wildtype patients after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ras_mutated + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.300 months for ras_mutated=1 versus 0 (SE 0.009, p=2.58e-247).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `right_sided_primary` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with left-sided primary tumors after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ right_sided_primary + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.288 months for right_sided_primary=1 versus 0 (SE 0.009, p=1.22e-206).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the top quartile of `cea_ng_ml` (>=10.070 ng/mL) have shorter `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ high_cea_q75 + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.245 months for top-quartile CEA versus lower CEA (SE 0.010, p=9.57e-125).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `braf_v600e` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `braf_v600e` equal to 0 after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ braf_v600e + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.198 months for braf_v600e=1 versus 0 (SE 0.022, p=3.52e-20).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `nras_mutation` equal to 1 have longer `pfs_months` than patients with `nras_mutation` equal to 0 after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ nras_mutation + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 0.191 months for nras_mutation=1 versus 0 (SE 0.026, p=3.72e-13).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 100 U/L higher `ldh_u_l` value is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ldh_per_100 + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.041 months per 100 U/L higher ldh_u_l (SE 0.006, p=1.95e-13).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `bone_mets` equal to 1 have slightly longer `pfs_months` than patients without bone metastases after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ bone_mets + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 0.023 months for bone_mets=1 versus 0 (SE 0.011, p=0.0415).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `liver_mets` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without liver metastases after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ liver_mets + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.007 months for liver_mets=1 versus 0 (SE 0.013, p=0.6034).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_regorafenib` equal to 1 have longer `pfs_months` than patients without regorafenib after adjustment for baseline prognostic factors.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 0.938 months for treatment_regorafenib=1 versus 0 (SE 0.010, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is smaller for each one-point higher `ecog_ps` score.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * ecog_ps + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_regorafenib x ecog_ps was -0.056 months (SE 0.015, p=2.85e-4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `right_sided_primary` equal to 1 than in left-sided patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * right_sided_primary + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_regorafenib x right_sided_primary was -1.435 months (SE 0.021, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 than in KRAS-wildtype patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * kras_mutation + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_regorafenib x kras_mutation was -1.634 months (SE 0.019, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with top-quartile `cea_ng_ml` (>=10.070 ng/mL) than in patients with lower CEA.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * high_cea_q75 + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_regorafenib x high_cea_q75 was -1.251 months (SE 0.023, p=1.00e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `braf_v600e` equal to 1 than in BRAF-wildtype patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * braf_v600e + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_regorafenib x braf_v600e was -0.983 months (SE 0.049, p=1.49e-88).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `nras_mutation` equal to 1 than in NRAS-wildtype patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib * nras_mutation + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_regorafenib x nras_mutation was 0.914 months (SE 0.060, p=1.81e-52).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `kras_mutation` with `pfs_months` is attenuated in patients with `right_sided_primary` equal to 1 compared with left-sided patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ right_sided_primary * kras_mutation + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for right_sided_primary x kras_mutation was 0.507 months (SE 0.019, p=2.62e-162).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of top-quartile `cea_ng_ml` (>=10.070 ng/mL) with `pfs_months` is attenuated in patients with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 compared with KRAS-wildtype patients.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ kras_mutation * high_cea_q75 + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for kras_mutation x high_cea_q75 was 0.423 months (SE 0.021, p=2.69e-94).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `treatment_cetuximab` with `pfs_months` is weaker in patients with `ras_mutated` equal to 1 than in RAS-wildtype patients.
The association of `treatment_pembrolizumab` with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `msi_high` equal to 1 than in patients with `msi_high` equal to 0.
The association of `treatment_encorafenib` with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `braf_v600e` equal to 1 than in patients with `braf_v600e` equal to 0.
The association of `treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `her2_amplified` equal to 1 than in patients with `her2_amplified` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab * ras_mutated + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_cetuximab x ras_mutated was 0.018 months (SE 0.019, p=0.3467).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * msi_high + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high was 0.038 months (SE 0.056, p=0.5026).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_encorafenib * braf_v600e + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_encorafenib x braf_v600e was -0.014 months (SE 0.070, p=0.8396).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib * her2_amplified + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib x her2_amplified was 0.009 months (SE 0.097, p=0.9249).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of top-quartile `nlr` (>=4.370) with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `msi_high` equal to 1 than in patients with `msi_high` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ msi_high * high_nlr_q75 + baseline covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for msi_high x high_nlr_q75 was -0.163 months (SE 0.047, p=5.30e-4).
